forbidden_scope: raw DOM, raw HAR, request/response body, screenshot, video, cookie, token, credential, profile path, or production payload capture
persistent SQLite evidence storage or filesystem artifact retention
hosted browser, provider marketplace, anti-detection success claims, or remote control console
Core, Lode, or App repository changes
merge or issue closeout before hosted gate success

integration_evidence.summary: Adds capture/readback entrypoints for Snapshot, RefMap, Evidence, and Core-facing scene refs on top of Runtime Session facts.
Stores process-local low-noise snapshot records, optional indexed RefMap records, Evidence records with provenance/redaction/retention facts, and structured unavailable states.
Centralizes opaque ref creation without exposing provider-specific or raw runtime endpoints.
Fixture and local-browser smoke now capture page-scene refs and print Core-readable scene refs.
Covers page-scene refs, evidence provenance/policy fields, raw payload exclusion, capture_denied, missing refs, and stale session-bound refs.
Binds the implementation to GH-92 and records coverage for #86 and #93-#96.
Maps GH-92 behavior evidence, validation evidence, and fresh verification input to the working tree before PR creation.

commands.notes: 6 node:test checks passed after adding page-scene refs coverage.
Fixture smoke produced runtime session, snapshot_ref, refmap_ref, evidence_refs, Core scene ref, readback, and close facts.
Local Chrome/149.0.7827.201 launched with a temporary dedicated profile and produced page-scene refs for about:blank without real accounts or production payloads.

First run after carrier creation blocked because .loom/progress/GH-92.md used non-contract Evidence Freshness `working_tree`; carrier was corrected to `current` and rerun passed at 2026-07-01T17:23:03Z.

Classified as tool path / CLI consumption gap: installed Loom build flow searches repo-local tools/loom.py for suite JSON consumption. Global `loom suite validate`, `loom suite carrier validate`, `loom suite evidence validate`, and `loom fact-chain` passed for GH-92, so this does not indicate product implementation failure.

validation.recheck_condition: Run hosted gate after PR creation or every push; require broader suite if persistent storage, public schema/SDK/OpenAPI, raw artifacts, Core/App repository changes, real account state, remote browser support, or Viewer/handoff scope is added.
